title: Verify a quantized checkpoint against budget
description: Steps to benchmark a quantized model versus full precision and accept or reject it on the quality delta.
body: Use when validating a quantized export before serving. Do not trust that quantization preserved quality based on a perplexity check alone — task and long-context behavior can degrade while perplexity barely moves. Actions: run the quantized and full-precision models on the task and capability evals, compute per-eval deltas, and accept only if every delta is inside the budget. Validation signals include a benchmark report of quantized vs full precision and a recorded accept/reject decision. Risk boundary: an over-quantized model fails silently on hard inputs; if any eval falls outside budget, deny the checkpoint and escalate to a higher bit-width.
